MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT DAVID LEE, HENRY LAM, BING SUM LEE, DAVID LEE AS TRUSTEE OF THE DAVID LEE REVOCABLE TRUST, DACD LEE AS TRUSTEE OF THE LEE FAMILY TRUST, BING SUM LEE AS TRUSTEE OF THE LEE FAMILY TRUST, BING SUM LEE AS TRUST OF THE LEE FAMILY EXEMPTION TRUST DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT:
APPEARANCE: Deborah Henderson, Esq. 552-2847 for pltfs & opposing parties; Leticia Gonzalez, Esq. Of Colombatto, Klimenko & Rosse 391-6182 for defts & moving parties.
RULING: The Court announced its tentative ruling on the demurrer as follows: Overrule as to each of the causes of action demurred to with the exception of the 10th cause of action, which complaint can be amended to correct typo re B&P section from 17900 to 17200. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling above. Pltf to prepare order. (302/REQ/BH(EX)) Court Reporter Beldon Yee, CSR #2647
